title: Seventeen Oranges By Bill Naughton | Explanation in Hindi | Class 6
description:
Caught smuggling seventeen oranges into a dockyard, a young cart-boy named Wally faces a terrifying choice — eat the evidence or face punishment — and what follows is one of the most gripping tales of childhood courage and quick thinking in the Class 6 English syllabus. Bill Naughton, a master of working-class storytelling, packs this short story with raw tension that makes students lean forward in their seats, not flip through notes. If you've been searching for a clear seventeen oranges explanation in Hindi that actually makes the story feel alive, you're exactly where you need to be.
